articles.title: Kitchener man charged after counterfeit cash allegedly used to buy gold bars in online marketplace scams
articles.summary: Peel Regional Police (PRP) have charged a 24‑year‑old Kitchener man in connection with two alleged scams involving counterfeit currency used to purchase precious metals from private sellers on online marketplaces. The Fraud Bureau launched the investigation after two sellers reported being defrauded during arranged meetups for gold and silver sales. Police say the first incident […]

articles.title: Scooter driver critically injured in crash near Bloor and Dufferin
articles.summary: A scooter driver has been critically injured following a crash involving a vehicle in Toronto’s west end. Emergency crews were called to the area of Bloor Street West and Dufferin Street just after 8 a.m. on Friday. Paramedics say they transported a man to hospital with life-threatening injuries. Police say the driver of the vehicle […]

articles.title: Windows smashed, graffiti sprayed at Vaughan business as police search for suspects
articles.summary: York Regional Police (YRP) are searching for two suspects after a business in Vaughan was vandalized last weekend, with windows smashed and graffiti sprayed across the property. Investigators say officers were called to the area of Langstaff Road and Dufferin Street near Hwy. 7 around 5 a.m. on July 12 after reports of damage to […]

articles.title: Mosquitos in York, Halton regions test positive for West Nile virus
articles.summary: York Region Public Health and Halton Region have confirmed some mosquitos in the regions have tested positive for West Nile virus.

articles.title: No injuries reported after 3-alarm blaze at Etobicoke bakery
articles.summary: No injuries were reported after a three-alarm blaze at an industrial bakery in Etobicoke on Thursday. Fire crews were called to the building on Carlingview Drive just after 4:30 p.m. for what was described as an oven fire. When crews arrived, they were met with heavy smoke and flames, which eventually made its way to […]

articles.title: Body of Brampton man found in Stoney Creek culvert, police say
articles.summary: Hamilton police have identified a body found this week in a culvert in Stoney Creek, Ont., as a Brampton man who had also lived in Halifax. Taranpreet Singh Sidhu, 29, had immigrated to Canada from India in 2022. Anyone who had contact with him before his death are asked to contact police.

articles.title: Markham is hosting an IndyCar race next month. Is the city ready?
articles.summary: The Ontario Honda Dealers Indy at Markham will take place in the city from Friday, Aug. 14 to Sunday, Aug. 16, and the city says it’s ready to welcome the drivers, along with tens of thousands of race fans.

articles.title: 2 dead, 3 injured in Highway 401 crash in Mississauga, OPP says
articles.summary: Ontario Provincial Police say two people are dead and three injured after a crash on Highway 401 in Mississauga.

articles.title: Teen who fatally stabbed elderly woman in Pickering receives 10-year maximum youth sentence
articles.summary: A 15-year-old boy who pleaded guilty to murdering an elderly woman in Pickering last year has received a 10-year sentence — the maximum for a youth convicted of first-degree murder.
